title: Buttery Festive Egg Roll Bhuna
description: A raw-friendly, festive Turkish dish featuring tender egg rolls coated in a buttery mixture, ideal for a light dinner.
instructions: Melt butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and finely chopped onion, sauté until translucent.
Stir in tomato sauce, cayenne pepper, and curry powder. Simmer for about 2 minutes.
Slice egg rolls into halves or thirds to ensure they fit evenly in the pan.
Place egg roll pieces in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Dip each piece of egg roll into the butter mixture.
Top each egg roll half with a spoonful of the tomato-butter sauce, pressing gently to adhere.
Bake for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and serve hot as a festive, raw-friendly side dish.
